privileged_info_summary: The task targets books.toscrape.com, a real public website with exactly 50 pages of book listings. The website is a legitimate web scraping sandbox. However, critical finding: books.toscrape.com contains NO structured data markup (no JSON-LD, Microdata, or RDFa) on any pages tested. The audit task will correctly identify this absence. The metadata's required_schema_keywords refer to report content validation, not website data presence. The audit is designed to report missing structured data and provide implementation recommendations.
